---
title: "About"
---

<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Your Website</title>
  <style>
    body {
      font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
      line-height: 1.6;
      margin: 20px;
    }
    .about-section {
      max-width: 600px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="about-section">
  <h2>About Us</h2>
  <p>Welcome to my website, your go-to source for my personal blogs and projects. We're dedicated to providing you with up-to-date information, with a focus on Data Science.</p>

  <p>Founded in 2023, This website has come a long way from its beginnings. We hope you enjoy my creativity and fund thing as much as I enjoy If you have any questions or comments, please don't hesitate to contact me</p>

  <p>Sincerely,<br>
     Sujan Bhattarai
</div>

</body>
</html>
